name: Arnab Mitra
title: Strategy & Operations Lead, Lemon Tree Hotels
quote: Ankur stands out as a rare blend of strong execution and strategic ownership. He doesn't just execute — he defines problem statements, aligns cross-functional stakeholders, and drives end-to-end delivery with clarity and ownership.
highlight: Someone you can rely on to take ambiguous, high-impact problems and convert them into structured, scalable solutions.

name: Akshat Rawat
title: Strategy & Operations, Lemon Tree Hotels
quote: In roles that sit at the intersection of technology and business, the ability to manage both the technical complexity and the people around it is rare. Ankur does both well.
highlight: He has a sharp eye for what the data is actually saying, and the ability to translate that into insights that stakeholders can act on — not just look at.

name: Praneet H. Surti
title: Strategy, Transformation & Finance
quote: He is knowledgeable, detail-oriented, and extremely personable — an amazing talent, focused and committed towards his set goals.
highlight: He believes in sharing knowledge. A positive spark — I have confidence he will go very far.
